situation: audit-2026-07-02-003 finding SK-RE-004: push.js:60 interpolates parent/winPath raw inside PowerShell single-quoted strings. Paths containing apostrophes would break the command or allow injection. Same pattern as SK-RE-002/003 (write-file.js/batch-write.js) which were already fixed in opt-runner-exec-1782940040 worktree but NOT yet merged to master — meaning audit-cycle-state.json marking those as 'merged' is inaccurate.
action: 派生 fix：在现有 opt-runner-exec-1782940040 worktree（同 area=runner-exec, route-fix 复用）内修改 push.js，从 ./write-file require escapePSSingleQuote 并应用到 parent 和 f.winPath 两处单引号插值点。未在 main 直接改动；main 上临时编辑已 git checkout 还原。
outcome_evidence: commit 7d3f8ca on auto/opt-runner-exec-1782940040; node -c push.js syntax OK; grep confirms both Path '${escapePSSingleQuote(parent)}' and Path '${escapePSSingleQuote(f.winPath)}' applied at line 66.
next_suggestion: 下轮继续派生 SK-RE-005 (pull.js:41 同类 PS 注入)，复用同一 worktree
人工 merge opt-runner-exec-1782940040 后回写 audit-cycle-state 把 SK-RE-002/003/004/014 状态真正标 merged
audit-cycle-state 失真问题需修正：derived_fixes.status='merged' 应只在 opt-worktree.sh merge 成功后才写入，不能提前标记

audit_findings.finding: PowerShell single-quote path injection: parent and f.winPath interpolated raw inside '...' strings passed to session.exec. A filename containing an apostrophe terminates the quoted string early, allowing arbitrary PS commands appended.
audit_findings.remediation: Import escapePSSingleQuote from write-file.js and wrap both path interpolations.

audit_findings.finding: State accuracy drift: SK-RE-002/003/014 derived_fixes entries marked status='merged' but corresponding commits (2ffb682, 0d04e9f) exist only on worktree branch auto/opt-runner-exec-1782940040, not on skills/master. Status was written prematurely before actual merge.
audit_findings.remediation: Next human merge of opt-runner-exec-1782940040 should be followed by audit-cycle-state update; consider adding a hook/gate that only allows status='merged' when opt-worktree.sh merge completes.
